top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a1
JOIN atom a2 ON a1.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON (c.atom_id = a1.atom_id AND c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id) OR (c.atom_id = a2.atom_id AND c.atom_id2 = a1.atom_id)
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE (a1.element = 'I' AND a2.element = 'S') OR (a1.element = 'S' AND a2.element = 'I')
AND b.bond_type = 'single';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a1
JOIN bond b ON a1.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE a1.element IN ('I', 'S') 
  AND a2.element IN ('I', 'S')
  AND b.bond_type = 'single';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a1
JOIN atom a2 ON a1.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON (c.atom_id = a1.atom_id AND c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id) OR (c.atom_id = a2.atom_id AND c.atom_id2 = a1.atom_id)
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE (a1.element = 'I' AND a2.element = 'S') OR (a1.element = 'S' AND a2.element = 'I')
AND b.bond_type = 'single';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE a.element IN ('I', 'S')
AND b.bond_type = 'single';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a1
JOIN bond b ON a1.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE a1.element IN ('I', 'S') 
  AND a2.element IN ('I', 'S')
  AND b.bond_type = 'single';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a1
JOIN atom a2 ON a1.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON (c.atom_id = a1.atom_id AND c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id) OR (c.atom_id = a2.atom_id AND c.atom_id2 = a1.atom_id)
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE (a1.element = 'I' AND a2.element = 'S') OR (a1.element = 'S' AND a2.element = 'I')
AND b.bond_type = 'single';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE a.element IN ('I', 'S')
AND b.bond_type = 'single';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a1
JOIN bond b ON a1.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE a1.element IN ('I', 'S') 
  AND a2.element IN ('I', 'S')
  AND b.bond_type = 'single';

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom a1
JOIN atom a2 ON a1.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON (c.atom_id = a1.atom_id AND c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id) OR (c.atom_id = a2.atom_id AND c.atom_id2 = a1.atom_id)
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE (a1.element = 'I' AND a2.element = 'S') OR (a1.element = 'S' AND a2.element = 'I')
AND b.bond_type = 'single';
